sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Athene Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Fixed Income Investor Call
feed.summary: Athene, a subsidiary of Apollo Global Management, announced it will host a Fixed Income Investor Call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 10:00 AM ET. Senior management will discuss business trends, new business origination, the investment portfolio, and capital. A webcast will be available on the Investor Relations section of Athene's website.

feed.title: Prepare for Long-Term Goals During Good Times - Raymond James - Commentaries
feed.summary: During periods of strong market performance, such as the double-digit returns seen in recent years, investors often accumulate significant wealth. This article from Raymond James advises investors to leverage these good times to refocus on long-term goals and rebalance portfolios. It suggests securing adequate income and cash flow for retirement by shifting some accumulated wealth into wealth preservation assets like individual bonds, especially for those at or near retirement age.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) soars to all-time high as 2 analysts turn bullish
feed.summary: The article reports that Western Digital (WDC) stock has reached an all-time high. This surge is attributed to two analysts issuing bullish ratings on the company.

feed.title: Dow stock steadies in premarket after a near-7% jump, with earnings next week in focus
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) shares are stabilizing in premarket trading after a significant 6.9% jump the previous day, spurred by news that tariffs against European allies would be held off. Investors are now keenly focused on the company's upcoming fourth-quarter earnings webcast on January 29th for insights into industrial demand, volumes, pricing, and the impact of its cost-cutting efforts in Europe. The market will be watching if Wednesday's rebound can be sustained and how policy news continues to affect cyclical stocks.

feed.title: Hudson Edge Investment Partners Inc. Has $7.64 Million Stock Position in United Rentals, Inc. $URI
feed.summary: Hudson Edge Investment Partners Inc. decreased its stake in United Rentals (NYSE:URI) by 25.8% in Q3, holding 8,003 shares valued at $7.64 million. Despite this reduction, other large institutions like Norges Bank and JPMorgan Chase significantly increased their holdings in the construction company. United Rentals has a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $966.29, despite missing Q3 EPS estimates but beating revenue expectations.

feed.title: Tilray Medical Italia launches
feed.summary: Tilray Medical has launched Tilray Medical Italia, formerly FL Group, to strengthen its presence in Italy's regulated medical cannabis market. This move aligns its operations under a single global brand and reinforces its commitment to providing high-quality medical cannabis products to patients and healthcare systems in Italy. The company will continue its partnership with Molteni to support physician education, prescribing, and patient access while upholding stringent quality and safety standards.

feed.title: Mizuho Lowers Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) Price Target to $304.00
feed.summary: Mizuho has lowered its price target for Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) from $315.00 to $304.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment reflects an 11.48% potential upside from the current stock price. Other analysts have also recently adjusted their ratings and price targets for the insurance provider.

feed.title: Does Analysts’ Defense Optimism Plus E‑Z‑GO’s 2027 Liberty Launch Change The Bull Case For Textron (TXT)?
feed.summary: Textron Inc. is gaining investor attention due to growing analyst optimism for its aerospace and defense operations, alongside the upcoming 2027 launch of its redesigned E-Z-GO Liberty vehicle. While the defense sector is a key short-term catalyst, the E-Z-GO release reinforces Textron's ability to refresh products across its diversified portfolio. The company's investment narrative focuses on its ability to convert its varied segments into profits, despite risks like slower growth forecasts and lower return on equity.

feed.title: $231.89 TER Teradyne NASDAQ Pre-Market 22 Jan 2026: AI demand signal
feed.summary: Teradyne (TER) stock is trading up 3.53% in pre-market on January 22, 2026, driven by strong AI infrastructure demand for test systems. Despite healthy margins and cash flow, the stock has an elevated valuation with a trailing PE of 84.02. Meyka AI's forecast model suggests a significant downside risk, projecting a 12-month value of $143.17, highlighting a cautious outlook despite bullish technicals.

feed.title: Get a fly-through tour of Morton Amphitheater in Riverside [VIDEO]
feed.summary: Live Nation has released a video fly-through of the Morton Amphitheater in Riverside, giving a preview of the venue before its anticipated June opening. The amphitheater's debut concert is scheduled to feature Weird Al Yankovic. The article also mentions related developments for the venue, including naming rights and bond reviews.

(NYSE:XYL) by 56.3% in the third quarter, reducing its holdings to 135,919 shares valued at approximately $20.05 million. feed.title: Mountain Pacific Investment Advisers LLC Sells 120,113 Shares of Assurant, Inc. $AIZ

feed.title: Abbott has mixed Q4 results, but medtech sales up 12.3%
feed.summary: Abbott reported mixed fourth-quarter 2025 results, with EPS beating analyst expectations but revenue falling short. Despite an overall decline in net earnings, the company's Medical Devices business performed strongly, with sales up 12.3%. Abbott also highlighted recent innovations and strategic moves, including FDA approval for its Volt pulsed field ablation system and plans to acquire Exact Sciences.

feed.title: Mountain Pacific Investment Advisers LLC Decreases Stake in Fastenal Company $FAST

Despite this, Fastenal reported Q3 EPS in line with estimates and revenue slightly below, while also increasing its quarterly dividend. The company maintains a "Hold" consensus analyst rating with a $48 price target.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan beats quarterly profit estimates on higher copper prices
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX.N) exceeded Wall Street's profit forecasts for the fourth quarter, driven by an increase in copper prices. The average realized copper price rose to $5.33 per pound, up from $4.15 a year prior, contributing to an adjusted profit of 47 cents per share against an estimated 29 cents. The company also benefits from a 50% tariff on copper imports, reinforcing its position as the largest U.S. producer.

feed.title: Alibaba, IBM, Nu Holdings And More: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades" featured analysts' top stock picks, including IBM, Alibaba, iShares U.S. Healthcare ETF, and Nu Holdings. IBM is anticipated to report strong earnings next week, while Alibaba is leveraging AI for global energy strategies through a nuclear power partnership. Nu Holdings recently announced a multi-year partnership with the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan: "As we enter 2026, our team has a clear focus on restoring operations at Grasberg safely and sustainably"
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan announced its focus for 2026 is to safely and sustainably restore operations at its Grasberg mine. The company also reported its Q4 2025 earnings, beating profit estimates with increased copper prices and providing sales expectations for 2026, including the phased restart of the Grasberg Block Cave underground mine in Q2 2026.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) announced strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with EPS of $1.13 and $3.86 respectively, beating expectations and showing significant year-over-year growth. The company highlighted net interest margin expansion, strong wealth and capital markets fees, and positive operating leverage, driven by successful execution of strategic initiatives like the Private Bank and "Reimagine the Bank" program. Citizens also provided a favorable 2026 outlook, projecting robust revenue growth, controlled expenses, and continued improvement in credit costs, while maintaining a strong capital position and planning substantial share repurchases.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TRV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. reported excellent Q4 2025 results, with core income of $2.5 billion and EPS of $11.13, exceeding expectations. The strong performance was driven by significant underwriting income and investment growth, enabling the company to return $1.9 billion to shareholders. Travelers also highlighted its successful "Innovation 1.0" strategy over the past decade and its ongoing "Innovation 2.0" efforts, emphasizing the integration of AI across its operations for improved efficiency and risk assessment.

feed.title: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE:TFC) reported strong Q4 2025 results, with net income of $1.3 billion or $1 per diluted share, and full-year net income of $5 billion or $3.82 per diluted share. The company outlined strategic priorities for 2026, including accelerated revenue growth, improved operating leverage, continued investment, and increased capital returns, targeting a 15% return on tangible common equity (ROTCE) by 2027. Management expressed confidence in achieving these goals through sustained momentum in consumer and wholesale banking, digital investments, and an optimized branch strategy.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY) reported record Q4 2025 orders, sales, and non-GAAP earnings, with sales up 7.3% and non-GAAP earnings up 14.1% year-over-year. The company's defense businesses remained strong, and commercial businesses began to recover, with significant growth in digital imaging and marine instrumentation. Teledyne is optimistic about 2026, forecasting approximately $6.37 billion in revenue and non-GAAP earnings of $23.65 per share, driven by continued organic growth and strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: News | CoStar World News for Jan. 22
feed.summary: This CoStar World News summary for January 22 covers diverse real estate developments globally. Key stories include plans for a Formula 1 trackside hotel in Belgium, the UK government's approval of a large Chinese embassy in London, and a French investor targeting healthcare real estate across Europe. Other notable news features a German investment firm freezing a residential fund due to redemptions, a surge in Canadian housing starts driven by rental demand, and U.S. regional banks resuming commercial property lending.

feed.title: Abbott posts Q4 topline miss as Nutrition unit contracts (ABT)
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) experienced a ~5% drop in premarket trading after reporting a Q4 2025 revenue miss, driven by weaker performance in its Nutrition segment. The company recorded $11.5 billion in net sales, growing ~4% year-over-year but falling short of the projected $11.8 billion.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan Inc expects consolidated sales of 640 million pounds of copper, 60 thousand ounces of gold and 22 million pounds of molybdenum in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. anticipates significant consolidated sales in Q1 2026, projecting 640 million pounds of copper, 60 thousand ounces of gold, and 22 million pounds of molybdenum. This outlook follows a strong Q4 2025 performance, where the company's adjusted net income rose, beating profit estimates due to higher copper prices. The company is also on track to restart operations at its Grasberg Block Cave underground mine in Indonesia in Q2 2026.

Insider activity for VRSK was mixed, with the CEO selling shares and a director buying shares, while the company itself beat Q3 EPS estimates but missed revenue, providing a 2025 EPS guidance of $6.80-$7.00.

(NYSE:AME) by 46.1%, now holding 191,686 shares valued at $36.04 million, which represents 5.6% of its investment portfolio. feed.title: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Alphabet, Callaway Golf, Datadog, Hyatt Hotels, Palantir, Texas Instruments, Verizon, and More
feed.summary: This article details Wall Street's top analyst research calls for Thursday, January 22, 2026, including upgrades for Alphabet, Callaway Golf, Datadog, Sphere Entertainment, and Texas Instruments, alongside downgrades for Amicus Therapeutics, Chemed, Hyatt Hotels, LCI Industries, and Legend Biotech. It also lists new initiations for Accenture, Dycom Industries, Kratos Defense, Palantir Technologies, and Verizon Communications. The report precedes these analyst calls with a market overview covering Wednesday's stock market rebound, treasury bonds, oil and gas prices, gold, and cryptocurrency performance.

feed.title: Is There Now An Opportunity In Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK)?
feed.summary: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) stock has seen significant price movements recently, fluctuating between US$314 and US$254. According to Simply Wall St's valuation model, the stock appears fairly priced, trading approximately 18% below its intrinsic value of $315.59. The company has a robust outlook with expected profit doubling in the next couple of years, suggesting potential for higher cash flow and share valuation in the future.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) Stock Rating Upgraded by Hsbc Global Res
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) has received a "strong-buy" rating upgrade from Hsbc Global Res. This upgrade comes amidst several other analysts raising their ratings or price targets for the stock, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $164.50. The article also details recent stock performance, earnings exceeding expectations, insider transactions, and institutional investor activity.

feed.title: CareCloud’s Wellsoft Ranked #1 EHR by Black Book 2026 for Emergency Medicine
feed.summary: CareCloud's Wellsoft Emergency Department Information System (EDIS) has been recognized by Black Book Research as the top-rated EHR for Emergency Medicine in its 2026 specialty ranking. This ranking highlights Wellsoft's speed, throughput visibility, and operational reliability, reinforcing its position as a trusted platform in high-acuity care. The recognition also underscores CareCloud's strategy to extend its emergency-grade clinical technology into the expanding urgent care market, where similar demands for rapid patient flow and reliability are crucial.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) Downgraded by Zacks Research to "Hold"
feed.summary: Zacks Research has downgraded Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating, citing mixed analyst sentiment. The stock currently holds an average rating of "Hold" and an average price target of $195.71, based on recommendations from 18 analysts. Marathon Petroleum recently reported Q3 earnings per share of $3.01, surpassing estimates, with revenue of $34.81 billion.

feed.title: Protara Therapeutics to Present Updated Interim Data from
feed.summary: Protara Therapeutics announced it will present updated interim data from its Phase 2 ADVANCED-2 trial of TARA-002 in BCG-Unresponsive non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) patients at the ASCO Genitourinary Cancers Symposium. The presentation will include safety and efficacy data from approximately 25 six-month evaluable patients and separate interim safety and tolerability data for both BCG-Naïve and BCG-Unresponsive patients. TARA-002 is an investigational cell therapy designed to activate immune responses against cancer.

feed.title: Bladder cancer trial shares new results from 25 patients at ASCO
feed.summary: Protara Therapeutics (NASDAQ: TARA) announced that updated interim data from its Phase 2 ADVANCED-2 trial for TARA-002 in BCG-unresponsive NMIBC patients will be presented at the ASCO Genitourinary Cancers Symposium in February 2026. The presentation will include safety and efficacy data from approximately 25 six-month evaluable patients, alongside interim safety and tolerability data from both BCG-naïve and BCG-unresponsive cohorts. TARA-002 is an investigational cell therapy for non-muscle invasive bladder cancer and lymphatic malformations.

feed.title: Powszechne Towarzystwo Emerytalne Allianz Polska S.A. Invests $19.65 Million in Freeport-McMoRan Inc. $FCX
feed.summary: Powszechne Towarzystwo Emerytalne Allianz Polska S.A. has invested approximately $19.65 million in Freeport-McMoRan Inc. The natural resources company recently beat quarterly earnings estimates but cut its dividend, while analysts maintain a largely positive outlook with an average target price near $55.30.

feed.title: Freeport Fourth-Quarter and Year Ended 2025 Financial and Operating Results Release Available on Its Website
feed.summary: Freeport (NYSE: FCX) announced the release of its fourth-quarter and year-ended 2025 financial and operating results, available on the Investor Relations page of its website. The company will host a conference call and webcast with securities analysts to discuss these results. Freeport, a leading international metals company focused on copper, operates significant assets globally including the Grasberg minerals district.

feed.title: Freeport 2025 results webcast, replay online through Feb. 20
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) announced the release of its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial and operating results on its investor relations website. The company is hosting a conference call for securities analysts to discuss these results, with a live webcast and slides available. A replay of the webcast will be accessible online until February 20, 2026.

feed.title: EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) Downgraded to "Strong Sell" Rating by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has downgraded EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) from a "hold" to a "strong sell" rating, with updated earnings estimates for FY2025, Q1 2026, and FY2027. This comes amidst other analyst ratings from firms like Mizuho, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan Chase & Co., and Royal Bank Of Canada, which mostly maintain "neutral" to "outperform" stances. The company's stock performance shows a 12-month low of $101.59 and a high of $136.20, with institutional investors holding a significant portion of its shares.

feed.title: CVS Health® makes health insurance simpler and more affordable for Americans
feed.summary: CVS Health has announced significant progress in simplifying and making healthcare more affordable, focusing on reducing prior authorizations, decreasing hospital readmissions, and lowering prescription drug costs. The company's Aetna segment has fewer medical services subject to prior authorization than competitors and is expanding bundled authorizations for various conditions. CVS Health is also driving down drug costs through biosimilars and sharing negotiation savings directly with members, while expanding low-cost primary care and preventive care options.

feed.title: CVS Health details prior auth cuts, drug savings push | CVS Stock News
feed.summary: CVS Health announced initiatives to simplify healthcare and lower costs, including significant reforms to Aetna's prior authorization process, which now approves over 95% of eligible requests within 24 hours. The company also highlighted its success in reducing drug costs, with a Humira alternative generating $1.3 billion in client savings. These efforts aim to make healthcare more affordable and accessible for Americans, with 85% of the population living near a CVS pharmacy.

feed.title: Zacks Research Upgrades Carter Bankshares (NASDAQ:CARE) to Hold
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Carter Bankshares (NASDAQ:CARE) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating. The bank currently holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $22.00 from analysts, despite missing its recent quarterly earnings estimates. Insider activity shows a director sold shares, while institutional investors have increased their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) Stock Rating Lowered by Zacks Research

Other analysts have also issued reports, with the stock currently holding an average "Reduce" rating and a target price of $21.40. feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. $TMO Shares Bought by VELA Investment Management LLC
feed.summary: VELA Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (TMO) by 65.5% in Q3, now owning 9,305 shares valued at $4.51 million.
